title: Caladenia grampiana
taxonomy: Caladenia grampiana is a species of orchid. It is a member of the family Orchidaceae. This orchid species is native to Western Australia. Caladenia grampiana is further classified into the subtribe Caladeniinae. Within this subtribe, it belongs to the genus Caladenia.
